entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange providing spot, margin, and swap markets, order-book trading, account balances, deposits and withdrawals, and REST and streaming API access.
entity.notes: Official HitBTC API documentation identifies the current API v3 trading engine. Current CCXT master integration dated 2026-07-09 retains HitBTC API v3 endpoints, official URLs, and support for spot, margin, swap, order-book, balance, deposit, withdrawal, and trading operations. Confidence is medium because this record does not yet reconstruct the full historical corporate and jurisdictional lifecycle.

evidence.title: HitBTC API reference
evidence.notes: Official HitBTC API repository identifies REST and Streaming API v3 as programmatic access to the HitBTC trading engine and directs users to the API v3 reference.

evidence.title: HitBTC current CCXT exchange integration
evidence.notes: Current CCXT master integration retains HitBTC API v3, official website and API URLs, and implemented support for spot, margin, swap, order books, orders, balances, deposits, withdrawals, and related account operations.

evidence.title: HitBTC exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: June 2026 candidate corpus source corroborates HitBTC as a currently represented exchange venue; duplicate registry rows are consolidated into one HEI entity.
